ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman MacLeod (Executor) in Propria Persona. Norman Summers (Creditor) in Propria Persona.

The Court explained that the Creditor's Claim was not submitted timely. Mr. MacLeod stated that the did not petition for extraordinary fees and that the accountant was paid to do the taxes. The Court noted that there are no time records for Mr. Summers. Mr. Summers explained at what capacity (Friend/Power of Attorney) he visited/spent time with the Decedent. The Court granted the accounting petition allowing/reducing the amount of the Creditor's Claim to $9,000.00 (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). Counsel is to submit a revised order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman MacLeod (Petitioner/Executor) in Propria Persona.

Mr. MacLeod stated that he omitted to attach the Creditor's Claim to the allowance of the claim, that he thought it was attached, that it was his error and that the Creditor should not be penalized. Mr. MacLeod also stated that the $500.00 claim (cash withdrawal) will be taken off. The accounting petition was continued to June 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. MacLeod to provide additional documentation to substantiate the Creditor's Claim.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
